title: Galería Güemes
summary: The Galería Güemes is a commercial gallery located on Florida Street in the city of Buenos Aires designed in the art Nouveau style by Italian architect Francesco Gianotti in 1913.
text:
The Galería Güemes is a commercial gallery located on Florida Street in the city of Buenos Aires designed in the art Nouveau style by Italian architect Francesco Gianotti in 1913.

Gallery
